intro: A study across numerous institutions found students using AI are becoming more productive and creative rather than dependent on the technology. Jedify raised $24 million to develop context graphs that help enterprise AI agents better understand business environments and operate more effectively. Anthropic released Claude Fable 5 to the public after months of restricted access, though researchers discovered the model silently downgrades responses for certain development tasks without user notification.

whitelist.title: Study shows many students are actually using AI for good
whitelist.desc: Students are actually being more productive and creative thanks to AI

whitelist.title: Jedify raises $24M to give enterprise AI agents the business context they lack
whitelist.desc: Enterprise artificial intelligence context startup Jedify Inc. today announced that it has raised $24 million in new funding to build what it calls context graphs that give AI agents the business know

whitelist.title: Anthropic releases ‘safe’ version of Claude Mythos AI model to public
whitelist.desc: AI company restricted access to Fable 5, its most powerful Mythos model, for months over cybersecurity concerns

whitelist.title: Artificial intelligence shines a light on hidden global migration flows
whitelist.desc: Training a neural network to collate data from several sources provides a high-resolution view of how people are moving around the world.

whitelist.title: Warner Music acquires AI attribution startup Sureel AI | TechCrunch
whitelist.desc: Through the acquisition, WMG aims to better track when its artists' work is used in AI-generated content or for training AI models.

whitelist.title: Anthropic accused of 'secret sabotage' as Claude Fable 5 silently limits capabilities for AI researchers and developers | Fortune
whitelist.desc: A paragraph buried in Fable 5's 319-page system card revealed the model would silently downgrade its responses for certain AI development work — without telling users.

whitelist.title: Anthropic CEO Says He Doesn’t Know How Claude Was Used In Iran School Bombing

whitelist.desc: A recent study found that Google's AI Overviews regularly provide incorrect information and contain facts not supported by cited sources.

whitelist.title: OpenAI backs Poetic to automate underwriting and compliance
whitelist.desc: Poetic emerged from stealth with $50M at a $500M valuation, backed by OpenAI, to automate underwriting, compliance and fraud for firms like AIG and SoFi.

whitelist.title: Mastercard launches protocol to let AI agents pay each other, send micropayments | Fortune
whitelist.desc: Agent Pay for Machines is one of a slew of recent attempts from big companies to build payment networks optimized for AI.

whitelist.desc: Google was one of Anthropic PBC’s earliest investors, repeatedly buying equity in the artificial intelligence firm. Now it’s increasingly backstopping the financing that underpins data centers for the startup, underscoring the complex business ties among the handful of largest tech companies pouring money into AI.

whitelist.title: A German court says Google’s responsible for false AI search results.

But AI overviews generate “independent, new, and substantive statements” by evaluating and combining content from various third-party sites.
